artifacts.title: Senior Project App

artifacts.title: Senior Capstone App - Product UI System Recreated

verification: File creation succeeded in plan team::1638213362346160913.
Canvas writes succeeded for all four planned pages before the final screenshot/metadata pass hit the Education-plan MCP tool-call limit for the new team.
Successful write calls returned page IDs, primary frame IDs, 9 status components, and key screen/state frame IDs.
